person_name: Patiens of Lyon, Bishop of Lyon (5th century)
person_name_full: Patiens of Lyon, Bishop of Lyon (5th century)
notes: Bishop of Lyon in the 5th century, noted for holiness, energy, strictness, mercy, and generosity toward the poor.

docs.title: Letter 2010
docs.author: Sidonius Apollinaris
docs.excerpt: … the zeal of Bishop Patiens -- a holy, energetic, strict, and merciful man who, through his abundant generosity and humanity toward the poor, raises himself to no lesser heights of a good conscience. 3.

docs.title: Letter 6012
docs.author: Sidonius Apollinaris
docs.excerpt: I pass over your unfailing balance of generosity and self-denial — so that the king praises your dinners while the queen praises your fasts. I pass over your beautification of the church entrusted to you, so that an observer cannot tell whether the new buildings are more
